training_data.notes: Google has not released detailed training data composition for Gemini. Heavy reliance on Google Search index and web crawl data — similar geographic distribution to CommonCrawl.

behavioral_profile.funding_bias: Heavy Google ecosystem suggestions — Google Scholar, Google for Startups
behavioral_profile.career_bias: Assumes stable broadband, Google Workspace, Western job market
behavioral_profile.entrepreneurship_bias: Defaults to Silicon Valley startup ecosystem
behavioral_profile.tone_pattern: Generally neutral but Western-centric in resource suggestions
behavioral_profile.notes: Gemini shows less explicit pushback than GPT-4o but similar resource displacement. Google ecosystem bias is distinctive.

cdi_preliminary.status: preliminary — to be updated after 54-prompt stress test
